name: Adventure Divers Pattaya
area: Central Pattaya — boat operates from Bali Hai Pier
desc: Established 1998. 27+ years operating. Own dive boat MV Saifon. Full PADI pipeline. HTMS Khram wreck specialist. English/Russian/Thai instruction.

name: AF Academy Football School Pattaya
area: Naklua + Jomtien + Pratumnak + Central Pattaya (multiple training locations)
desc: From age 3 — youngest accepted in Pattaya football. Multi-location. Russian/English/Thai. Indoor + outdoor fields.

name: ALFA BJJ Pattaya
desc: Pattaya’s first ever dedicated Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu gym. Standalone BJJ academy with Gi + No-Gi classes, all levels welcome. Pure-BJJ environment distinct from multi-discipline MMA gyms.

name: Andaz Pattaya Jomtien Beach (Hyatt)
desc: 5-star Hyatt Andaz boutique. 24-hour Technogym fitness + 3 pools (adult/beachfront/family) + Panpuri Spa with 6 rooms + Japanese onsen + Turkish + Finnish baths.

name: Anytime Fitness Pattaya
desc: Anytime Fitness 24/7 commercial gym in Pattaya — Bukis Point South Pattaya branch on Sukhumvit Rd plus Again Pattaya outpost. International chain access via single membership.

name: Aquanauts Dive Center Pattaya
area: Pattaya — boat departures from Bali Hai Pier
desc: Pattaya only British/Dutch-owned PADI 5-Star CDC + National Geographic Dive Center. 13+ years. Full tech instructor pipeline. Conservation focus.

name: Ashtanga Yoga Pattaya
desc: Traditional Ashtanga yoga studio offering Mysore-style self-practice and led primary series classes with hands-on adjustments. Soi 12 Thepprasit / Jomtien.

name: ATV & Off-Road Tours Pattaya (Multi-Operator)
area: 30 min east of Pattaya — Pong Village near Lake Mabprachan + various
desc: Multiple ATV/Buggy/Enduro tour operators east of Pattaya. Polaris ATVs + 500cc CF MOTO + 660cc Buggies. Beginner to extreme tours. Hotel pickup free.

name: Balance Yoga Studio Pattaya
desc: Yoga + sound healing. Steps from the sea. 'Island of harmony in sunny Pattaya'.

name: Bangkok Hospital Pattaya — Sports Rehabilitation & Wellness
desc: BDMS-network JCI-accredited international hospital. Rehabilitation Center for sports/orthopedic/neuro injuries. Prestige Wellness Anti-Aging Center with DNA fitness profiling and weight mana

name: Bangpra International Golf Club
area: Sri Racha / Bang Phra (40 km north of Pattaya)
desc: Opened 1958 — one of the first golf courses in the Pattaya region. 18 holes, par 72, 1988 renovation.

name: Battle Conquer Gym Pattaya
desc: Pattaya's only fully air-conditioned Muay Thai gym. Weight room, sauna, ice plunge. 7-day flexible scheduling, English-speaking trainers.

name: Bean Cow Climbing Gym & Community Center
desc: Family-friendly climbing gym. 8m wall. Top rope + lead climbing. CWA-certified teachers, belayer services, top rope safety classes.

name: Big Buddha Hill (Wat Phra Yai) — Pratamnak Landmark + Stair Climb
desc: Pattaya iconic 18m golden Buddha at peak of Pratamnak Hill. Free entry. Accessed via 100+ step grand staircase (genuine cardio climb). 360 degree panoramic Pattaya Bay + Jomtien views. Sunri

name: Bira Circuit (FIA-Standard Motor Racing Track)
desc: Thailand first FIA-standard motor racing circuit. 2.41 km. 30 pit garages. 30,000 spectator capacity. SEATCZC + Asian Formula 2000 host since 1990s. Named after Prince Birabongse - Thailand

name: BOUNCE Pattaya — Trampoline Park
desc: International trampoline park franchise on 6F Harbor Pattaya Mall. Free Jump arena, slam dunk lane, dodgeball, performance airbag, Mini BOUNCE for toddlers. BOUNCE FIT adult cardio classes.

name: Burapha Golf Club
desc: 36 holes designed for natural beauty (lakes, hills, palms). Hosted 2010 Thailand Open. Top tournament venue.

name: Cape Dara Resort
desc: 5-star beach-cliff luxury. Infinity pool + Luminous Spa + mineral bath + sauna + steam + beauty centre + fitness with yoga classes.

name: Cartoon Network Amazone Waterpark (now Columbia Pictures Aquaverse)
area: Na Jomtien / Sattahip — 15 km south of Pattaya
desc: World first themed waterpark. 18 slides across 3 zones. Polin Waterparks hardware. Rebranded 2022 to Sony Pictures IPs. 15km south of Pattaya.

name: Castra Gym
desc: Relaxed atmosphere from bodybuilders to general fitness. East Pattaya location, less touristy.

name: Centara Grand Mirage Beach Resort
desc: 5-star Lost World themed family resort. On-site water park + 230m private beach + Spa Cenvaree (24 rooms) + rock climbing wall + 2 tennis + Pilates/aqua/kayaking.

name: Chatrium Golf Resort Soi Dao Chanthaburi
area: Khao Soi Dao Mountains, Chanthaburi (3 hours from Pattaya)
desc: 27-hole course, driving range, pro shop, three-floor clubhouse with hotel, pool, locker rooms, spa, restaurants.

name: Chee Chan Golf Resort
desc: Premium destination golf resort in Na Jomtien / Sattahip with Buddha Mountain views, championship layout, and modern clubhouse facilities. ฿฿฿ green fees.

name: Cho Nateetong Thai Boxing Camp
desc: Authentic budget Pattaya Muay Thai camp. ~฿270 per session. Combined weight gym + dedicated Muay Thai area. Patient trainers with good pad time.

name: Clubloongchat Watersports
desc: Beachside watersports school: kitesurfing, wingfoiling, windsurfing, sailing, SUP. Expert lessons + rentals.

name: Coco Fitness
desc: Central Pattaya commercial gym on the 4th floor of Mike Shopping Mall. Sea-view cardio, walk-in day passes, towel and locker included, and value monthly pricing.

name: Cross Pattaya Pratamnak (Cloud Club + PLAYROOM)
desc: Pratamnak Hill hotel fitness club with Cloud Club gym, PLAYROOM kids zone, swimming pool, and day-pass access for non-guests. Walkable to Royal Cliff cluster.

name: CrossFit Pattaya @ The Jungle Gym
desc: Pattaya's only CrossFit affiliate. Multi-discipline: CrossFit + MMA + archery + dodgeball + slacklining. Coach Murray. UA & Decathlon partners.

name: Deep Climbing Gym (Harbor Pattaya)
area: Na Kluea / North Pattaya — Harbor Pattaya Mall, 8th Floor
desc: Pattaya's first indoor climbing gym. Air-conditioned, 10m wall, ocean theme. Top rope, auto-belay, lead, bouldering routes.

name: Diamond Badminton
desc: South Pattaya badminton facility on Pattaya 3rd Road with multiple wood-floor courts available for hourly hire, plus equipment rental and casual play nights.

name: Diana Driving Range Pattaya
desc: 30-bay floodlit dedicated driving range. 200-yard depth. On-site restaurant. Soi Diana area central. Professional teaching pros.

name: Dive Station Pattaya
area: Pattaya — boat departures from Bali Hai Pier
desc: SSI-certified dive operation. First-timer + certified + snorkeling on same boat. Continental European visitor friendly.

name: Dragon Shooting Club Pattaya
desc: Largest indoor shooting range in Thailand. 20 standard + 3 private VIP lanes. Modern firearms. Fully air-conditioned.

name: Dusit Thani Pattaya — Devarana Wellness
desc: Iconic 5-star Thai-heritage resort since 1973. Devarana Wellness with cascading waterfall garden, fitness centre, traditional Thai massage, yoga, meditation, active stretching. Two oceanfron

name: EasyKart Pattaya Thepprasit (Outdoor Go Kart Track)
desc: Newest go-kart facility in Pattaya. Outdoor 350m beginner + 800m racing tracks. Multi-tier classes: Kids/Regular/Fast/2-Seater. From 480 baht.

name: Elite Gym & Fitness Pattaya
area: Sukhumvit Road (between Soi 42 and 44, opposite Soi 65)
desc: Modern facility with top-notch equipment. Integrates yoga and other fitness programs.

name: Euro Badminton
desc: East Pattaya multi-sport club on Soi Chaiyaphruek 2 with badminton courts, swimming pool, and on-site Thai-food restaurant — popular casual community venue.

name: Fairtex Training Center Pattaya
desc: World's largest Muay Thai resort camp. 9 rings, 17 trainers, on-site hotel & 25m pool. Champions: Yodsanklai, Stamp, Smilla Sundell, Saemapetch.

name: FAST PRO Football Academy Pattaya
area: Two locations — Horseshoe Point Pattaya + IP Soccer Club Pattaya
desc: UEFA-A licensed European football coach. Ages 4-15. Two locations. European-style technical + tactical + character training.

name: Fight EVO360 Muay Thai Gym
desc: Combines traditional Muay Thai and boxing values with structured sports science and performance-based programming. Full profile in progress — confirm details with the venue.

name: First Serve Sports Club
desc: Swim teaching by Swimming Association of Thailand-trained instructors. All ages, English or Thai.

name: Fitness 7 Pattaya (The Avenue)
area: The Avenue Pattaya / Central Pattaya (parallel to Beach Road)
desc: 2000+ sqm, 24-hour gym in Avenue Pattaya. Cardio, weights, free weights, boxing ring, functional training areas.

name: Fitz Club — Racquets, Health & Fitness (Royal Cliff Hotels Group)
desc: Award-winning luxury sports club: 7 tennis courts, 2 AC squash courts, table tennis, swimming, gym, professional coaching. Premium tier.

name: Flight of the Gibbon — Khao Kheow Canopy Zipline
area: Khao Kheow / Si Racha (1 hour from Pattaya, 90 min from Bangkok)
desc: Largest canopy zipline in Thailand. 3 km course, 24 platforms. Inside Khao Kheow Open Zoo wildlife sanctuary. 2.5-hour zipline + zoo + lunch all-inclusive day.

name: Golf Hub Pattaya (Indoor Simulator + Club Fitting)
desc: Only premium indoor simulator + club fitting in Pattaya. TrackMan / GC Quad launch monitor. AC year-round practice. Multiple locations.

name: Greenwood Golf Club & Resort (formerly Noble Place)
area: Ban Bueng, Chonburi (1 hour from Pattaya, toward Chonburi)
desc: 27-hole Peter Thomson + Dennis Wolveridge design. Tree-lined Chonburi hills. Australian Open Champion architect. Value pricing for premium architecture.

name: Greta Sport Club Pattaya (at Greta Resort)
area: Na Jomtien / Sattahip (18 km south of central Pattaya / Walking Street)
desc: 6 covered tennis courts with rain protection. Beautifully constructed roofed tennis venue.

name: Hard Rock Pool Pattaya
area: Hard Rock Hotel Pattaya — Central Pattaya Beach Road
desc: Hard Rock Hotel Pattaya iconic guitar-shaped 2,000 sqm free-form pool with artificial sand beach, swim-up bar, and day-pass access for non-guests on Beach Road.

name: Hilton Pattaya — Fitness Center, Spa & Pool
area: Central Pattaya — Beach Road / Central Festival Mall
desc: 5-star Hilton with 24-hour fitness center, 16th-floor outdoor infinity pool, eforea Spa multi-award-winning. Beach Road central. Day-pass available.

name: Holiday Inn Pattaya
desc: 4-star Beach Road IHG. Two outdoor infinity pools (Bay Tower L4 + Executive Tower L6), modern fitness centre with Pattaya Bay views, Tea Tree Spa, Kids Club. Central beachfront family-friend

name: Horseshoe Point Resort & Country Club
desc: 1,500-acre equestrian + adventure mega-facility. International Riding School (est 1999). 5 indoor/outdoor arenas, 100+ horses (Lusitano, Appaloosa, Lipizzaner, Arabs, Warmbloods, Falabella,

name: InterContinental Pattaya Resort
desc: 5-star IHG hilltop resort. 3 outdoor pools incl. 25m lap pool, Amburaya Spa, 24-hour fitness, on-site tennis courts, sea-view Cliff restaurant. Pratamnak Hill — adjacent to Royal Cliff / Fit

name: Jetts Fitness Pattaya
desc: 24/7 fitness chain. Royal Garden Plaza branch closed May 2022; Little Walk remains the only Pattaya club. No-contract memberships, modern equipment.

name: Jomtien Beach Volleyball Courts
desc: Pattaya beach volleyball community. Multiple Jomtien courts. Free pickup play. Mixed Thai-international.

name: Jomtien Dive Center
desc: PADI 5-Star Instructor Development Center on Jomtien Beach offering full PADI course progression from Open Water through Divemaster + Instructor — long-trusted operator.

name: Jomtien Public Swimming Pool
desc: One of Pattaya's two public swimming pools — operated by the city on the South Pattaya / Jomtien border with affordable lap-swim access, kids' pool, and changing facilities.

name: JumpZ Trampoline Park
area: Harbor Pattaya Shopping Mall — Central Pattaya Road
desc: Pattaya main indoor trampoline park. 6th floor Harbor Pattaya Mall. Indoor AC family activity.

name: KBA Kiteboarding Asia Pattaya (Blue Lagoon)
desc: KBA Pattaya kiteboarding + foiling school at Blue Lagoon Na Jomtien. Pattaya branch of Thailand's leading multi-location chain (also Samui, Phuket, Hua Hin, Phangan).

name: Khao Chi Chan (Buddha Mountain) — Walking & Meditation
area: Na Chom Thian / Sattahip — 20 km southeast of Pattaya
desc: FREE public walking + meditation site. Worlds largest cliff Buddha image (109m × 70m, 24-carat gold). 1995-96 royal Jubilee commission. Landscaped gardens.

name: Khao Kheow Country Club
area: Bang Phra / Si Racha (between Bangkok and Pattaya)
desc: Pete Dye-designed 27-hole championship course in Bang Phra / Si Racha — host of Asian Tour Thailand Open and one of Pattaya's most strategic, water-defined layouts.

name: Kitesurf Pattaya
desc: IKO-certified kitesurfing school at south end of Jomtien Beach. 3-day beginner package from $250 includes equipment, instruction, and IKO Level 1-2 certification.

name: Koh Larn (Coral Island) — Pattaya's Day-Trip Beach Destination
area: Offshore — 7 km west of Pattaya (30-min ferry)
desc: Pattaya primary day-trip beach island. 30-min ferry from Bali Hai Pier. 6 beaches (Tawaen, Samae, Tien, Nual, Ta Yai, La). Parasailing, banana boats, jet ski, snorkeling, intro scuba, beach

name: Kombat Group Thailand
area: Huai Yai / East Pattaya (rural, near Chak Nok Lake)
desc: All-inclusive multi-discipline camp. Christian Daghio's legacy (190 MT fights, 7x World Champ). Muay Thai+Boxing+MMA+BJJ+Krav. 6 rings. 5/5 TripAdvisor.

name: Laem Chabang International Country Club
desc: Jack Nicklaus design (1995). 27 holes. Widely considered the best golf course layout in Pattaya.

name: Lumpinee Boxing Stadium (Bangkok day-trip)
area: Bangkok — Ramintra Road (1.5–2 hrs from Pattaya)
hours: Fight nights Friday + Saturday morning (no daily hours)
desc: World most prestigious Muay Thai stadium. ONE Lumpinee weekly Friday cards (12 bouts) + Fairtex Fight Saturday morning. Day-trip from Pattaya for serious MT students. Tickets ฿1500-4500.

name: Manhattan Pattaya (Hotel Gym)
desc: Manhattan Pattaya hotel gym on Pratamnak / Central Pattaya — fitness equipment, outdoor swimming pool, and day-pass access for non-guests within walking distance of beach.

name: Manta Kids Pattaya (IG Center)
desc: Premier kids swim academy. Head coach is former Thai national swimmer. ASCTA-certified instructors. ฿9,900/quarter (10 sessions).

name: MAX Muay Thai Stadium Pattaya
area: Sukhumvit Road — next to King Power Pattaya
hours: Nightly shows, usually 19:00 or 19:45 by date; doors around 18:45
desc: Pattaya daily Muay Thai stadium near King Power on Sukhumvit Road. Tourist-friendly live fight cards, online ticketing, and current listings that vary between 19:00 and 19:45 starts by date.

name: Megabreak Pool Hall Pattaya
hours: Daily — late afternoon to late night
desc: Pattaya’s most respected dedicated pool hall. Tournament-class 9-foot pool tables + snooker. Long-running expat institution on Soi Diana, central Pattaya. ฿200–฿400/hour walk-in.

name: Mermaid's Dive Center
area: Jomtien (Soi White House) + Pattaya Beach Road + Bangkok (Amarin Plaza)
desc: PADI 5-Star IDC dive center. Day trips, courses beginner to instructor, technical diving.

name: Mountain Shadow Country Club
area: Halfway between Bangkok and Pattaya / Si Racha
desc: Ron Fream-designed 18-hole par-72 golf course halfway between Bangkok and Pattaya, built on a former mango plantation with four rare island greens and 6,722-yard layout.

name: Mövenpick Siam Hotel Na Jomtien Pattaya
desc: 5-star Swiss-hospitality (Accor). 24-hour 2nd-floor fitness with floor-to-ceiling windows. 262 rooms. Seafront + lagoon pools. Little Birds Kids Club.

name: Muscle Factory Pattaya
desc: Largest hardcore gym in Pattaya. Multi-floor 3-story Pratamnak bodybuilding institution. Bangkok sister gym. Industrial fans, no AC.

name: Naklua Public Swimming Pool
desc: City-operated public swimming pool in Naklua / North Pattaya offering affordable lap-swim and recreational access with kids' pool, changing rooms, and resident discounts.

name: No Limit Divers
desc: PADI 5-Star Instructor Development Center based in Pattaya / Jomtien, offering full PADI internship programs from Open Water Diver through Course Director-level certification.

name: Nok Yoga Pattaya
area: Naklua / Pattaya-Naklua Road (near Jomtien Beach for some sessions)
desc: Naklua / Pattaya-Naklua Road yoga studio offering Hatha, Vinyasa, and traditional Thai Reusi Dat Ton stretching for all levels with some sessions at Jomtien Beach.

name: Nong Nooch Tropical Garden — Thai Cultural & Muay Thai Show
area: Na Chom Thian / Sattahip — 20 km south of Pattaya
desc: Southeast Asia largest botanical garden (600 acres). Daily 90-min cultural show: Thai dance + Muay Thai demo + sword fighting + elephant show.

name: Ocean Marina Jomtien — Southeast Asia's Largest Marina
desc: Southeast Asia largest marina. 455 wet berths + 100 trailer + 30 hardstand. Yachts up to 75m. Award-winning. Top of the Gulf Regatta host. SailBreeze sailing school on-site. Yacht charter +

name: One-D Yoga Studio
hours: Daily classes — verify schedule with studio
desc: Modern multi-style yoga studio at 571/32 Naklua 16/2 offering daily Hatha, Vinyasa Flow, and Yin classes plus private sessions, workshops, and weekend / weeklong retreats.

name: Pattana Golf Club & Resort (Pattana Sports Resort)
area: Si Racha (40 km north of Pattaya, 90 min from Bangkok)
desc: 27-hole Pattana Golf Club & Resort in Si Racha — championship layout (40 km north of Pattaya, 90 min from Bangkok) plus on-site sports resort with multiple recreation amenities.

name: Pattaya Archery Club
desc: Non-profit archery club founded 2006. Beginner to expert. On-site bungalow accommodation, pool, tennis court, fishing boat. Affordable patient coaching.

name: Pattaya Beach Public Aerobics — Open-Air Free Fitness
desc: FREE open-air group fitness on Pattaya Beach + Jomtien Beach boardwalks. Daily Zumba aerobics, dance fitness, yoga, tai chi, stretching. No fee, no signup. Genuine Thai cultural fitness phen

name: Pattaya Bike and Boat Tours
desc: Guided bicycle + boat tour operator. Quiet back-road routes through real Thai villages, plantations, fishing communities. Small-group English-speaking tours. Bike rental also available. Nakl

name: Pattaya Bowl (Soi Regent Marina)
area: North Pattaya — Pattaya 2nd Road / Soi Regent Marina
desc: Pattaya's classic North Pattaya bowling alley off Pattaya 2nd Road / Soi Regent Marina — modern lanes, casual pricing, hourly hire, plus arcade and food.

name: Pattaya Boxing World Stadium
desc: Pattaya secondary Muay Thai fight stadium. Wed + Fri 20:00 real fights. Frank Sitpholek promoted. Multi-tier matchups (kids through pros). More authentic vs MAX.

name: Pattaya City Football Academy
desc: Bronze-level Academy License (Football Association of Thailand). Children ages 6-14.

name: Pattaya Country Club
area: Khao Mai Kaeo (one of the closest courses to Pattaya proper)
desc: 18-hole Pattaya Country Club at Khao Mai Kaeo — one of the closest golf courses to Pattaya proper with championship layout, mature parkland setting, and value-tier green fees.

name: Pattaya Cricket Club
desc: Established 2010. Only Pattaya cricket club competing in Bangkok Cricket League. 3 teams: Stallions (1st XI), Thoroughbreds (over-45), Juniors. Nov-June season.

name: Pattaya Cycling Clubs (Cuore Masters / Monkey Xtreme / Jomtien Cycling)
area: Various — meet points across Pattaya / East Pattaya / Jomtien
desc: Multiple road and MTB clubs. Cuore Masters Team + Monkey Xtreme + Jomtien Cycling + Pattaya MTB. Free to ฿2,000/year.

name: Pattaya Dive Centre
area: Pattaya Beach Road (between Soi 10 and Soi 11)
desc: Pattaya's only Beach Road PADI Dive Centre. 24+ years established. All PADI courses + Tec.

name: Pattaya Floating Market — Muay Talay & Cultural Activities
desc: Cultural-sport park on canals across 4 Thai regional zones. Live Muay Talay (water boxing on tree-trunk over canal) shows 3x daily. Rowboats, amphibious boats, water zipline, Thai dance. Dis

name: Pattaya Golf Driving Range
desc: Standalone Pattaya driving range with multi-tier hitting bays, putting green, short-game practice area, and equipment rental — ideal for warm-ups before championship rounds.

name: Pattaya Hash House Harriers
area: Pattaya / East Pattaya / various run locations
desc: First Pattaya hash, mixed running club since 1984. World's largest weekly running club. 'Drinking club with a running problem'.

name: Pattaya Kart Speedway
desc: First karting track in Pattaya — 1987, 35+ years. Two tracks (450m beginner + 750m pro). Multi-activity compound: ATV + paintball + bungee.

name: Pattaya Lawn Bowls Clubs (Banchang / Paradise / The Retreat)
desc: Three lawn bowls facilities. 14+ artificial rinks total. Banchang ฿250/day all-inclusive. Pattaya Sports Club League runs year-round.

name: Pattaya Marathon (Amazing Thailand Pattaya Marathon)
area: Pattaya Beach (full marathon route along the bay)
desc: Pattaya flagship annual road race since 1992. World Athletics International Standard. Fun Run / 10K / 21K / 42K. 15,000+ runners. Boston Qualifying valid.

name: Pattaya Marriott Resort and Spa
desc: 5-star Marriott Bonvoy beachfront resort on Na Jomtien Beach. Multiple outdoor pools, oceanfront fitness centre, Quan Spa (Marriott Asian-wellness signature), Kids Club, direct beach access.

name: Pattaya Monkey Hash House Harriers
area: Various (run starting points across Pattaya region)
desc: Pattaya hash variation. Runs every 2nd, odd-numbered month, usually 3rd Saturday. ~2.5h duration.

name: Pattaya Padel Club (Mabprachan Lake)
desc: Lakeside padel courts on Mabprachan Reservoir. Pattaya second padel facility alongside Play Padel.

name: Pattaya Panthers Rugby Football Club
desc: Pattaya only rugby club. Contact + touch rugby formats. Annual Pattaya Tens tournament in May with international touring teams. Beginner-friendly.

name: Pattaya Park Water & Fun Park (with Tower Jump)
area: South Pattaya / Jomtien border — Soi 12 Thappraya Rd
desc: Original Pattaya 1989 complex. Tower Jump (170m zip line from 56th floor) + water park + private beach + amusement park.

name: Pattaya Public Running Routes & Parks (Beach + Mabprachan + City Parks)
area: Multiple — Pattaya Beach, Jomtien Beach, Mabprachan, Pratumnak Park, Nongprue Park
desc: Free public running guide. Pattaya Beach 5.8km, Jomtien Beach, Mabprachan 4km loop, Pratumnak Park, Nongprue 1km, Chaiyapruek 400m track.

name: Pattaya Sai 3 Petanque Club
desc: French-influenced petanque community. Central Pattaya Soi 3. All ages, drop-in friendly.

name: Pattaya Scuba Adventures
area: Pattaya / boat operations from Bali Hai Pier
desc: PADI dive center based in Pattaya with boat operations from Bali Hai Pier — full course progression, daily fun-dives to Pattaya islands, and guided trips for certified divers.

name: Pattaya Shooting Park
area: Soi Khao Mai Kaew / East Pattaya
desc: Largest outdoor shooting range in Pattaya. Diverse firearms (.22, .38, .45, 9mm, shotguns). Free hotel pickup in most packages.

name: Pattaya Sky Ride — Helicopter Tours & Bangkok-Pattaya Charter
area: Pattaya — landing pads at Royal Cliff Beach + various
desc: Pattaya helicopter sightseeing + Bangkok-Pattaya charter (45-min). Airbus EC-135 + EC-130 aircraft. Up to 6 passengers. 129,200 THB Bangkok-Pattaya charter.

name: Pattaya Sports Club
desc: Multi-sport sports club with tennis and other facilities. Non-profit, ~4,700 active members.

name: Pattaya Tennis & Badminton Inter Club
desc: Multiple courts: pickleball, badminton, tennis, table tennis. Multi-racquet facility.

name: Pattaya Tennis Club
desc: Central Pattaya outdoor tennis facility with multiple floodlit hard courts, coaching for all levels, equipment rental, drop-in pickup play, and member-led social leagues.

name: Pattaya Thai Boxing & Fitness Gym (Jomtien)
desc: Walk-in budget gym in Jomtien. ~฿300 for equipment + 4-5 rounds of pads. Pro fighter Champ on roster. Air fans, no AC.

name: Pattaya Triathlon (Thailand Tri-League)
area: Pattaya Beach + Sukhumvit Highway + Pattaya Hill
hours: Tour Series — multiple races per year
desc: Most popular triathlon in Thailand. Thailand Tri-League series with Bangsaen + Pattaya + Sattahip. 1,500+ triathletes. Iconic Pattaya Hill run finish.

name: Petchrungruang Gym
desc: Pattaya's 2nd-oldest gym (1986). Three generations of family. Head coach Khru Nu (Lumpinee 2nd-place, 90 fights). Home of Sylvie von Duuglas-Ittu (270+ fights).

name: Phoenix Gold Golf & Country Club
desc: Multiple loops with beginner-friendly options. Established Pattaya golf destination.

name: Pickleball Pattaya
desc: Pattaya's flagship dedicated pickleball facility on Pratumnak Soi 6. Two full-sized courts, paddles, balls, ball machine, strong lighting, and beginner lessons from an English-speaking licen

name: Planet Football Pattaya (FC Planet)
desc: Multi-tier football academy in Pattaya — soccer schools for beginners, development squads, competitive academy programs, and FC Planet senior team for ages 5+ to adults.

name: Platinum Fitness Club
desc: Pattaya Klang central commercial gym with 17.5-hour daily operating window (05:30-23:00), full air-conditioning, comprehensive cardio + weight machines, group classes, and sauna.

name: Play Padel Pattaya
desc: Pattaya's first dedicated padel club at Kasetsin Soi 3, Pratumnak — also Thailand's first indoor padel courts with bookable hourly play, equipment rental, and clinics for all levels.

name: Pratumnak Fitness Park (Free Outdoor Calisthenics)
desc: Pattaya FREE outdoor public fitness park. Free weights + machines + cardio + calisthenics. Pratumnak Hill / Buddha Hill setting. Up to 75lb dumbbells.

name: Rage Fight Academy
area: Thappraya Road / South Pattaya (5 min from Dongtan & Jomtien beaches)
desc: Multi-discipline academy: Muay Thai, Boxing, BJJ, MMA, Cross Training. 3 rings + BJJ/MMA mats. Education Visa sponsor for long-stays.

name: Rajadamnern Stadium (Bangkok day-trip)
area: Bangkok — Ratchadamnoen Nok Avenue (1.5–2 hr from Pattaya)
hours: Almost nightly — Sat RWS is flagship
desc: World first Muay Thai stadium, founded 1945. Almost nightly fight cards. RWS Rajadamnern World Series Saturday flagship (8 fights + free beers). Tickets ฿1,600-4,500. Pair with Lumpinee for

name: Ramayana Water Park Pattaya
area: Na Jomtien / Sattahip — 20 km south of Pattaya
desc: Largest water park in Thailand and Southeast Asia. 184,000 sqm. 26 slides / 34 lanes. 600m lazy river around natural hill. Double wave pool with 150m beach. TripAdvisor 2019 #1 Asia / #10 Wo

name: Rambaa Somdet M16 Muay Thai & MMA
area: Nong Prue / East Pattaya (100m from Sor Klinmee)
desc: Personal camp of Rambaa M16 — Thailand's first MMA world champion (Shooto Flyweight 2009) + Muay Thai legend. Cage on site. 100m from Sor Klinmee.

name: Real Divers Pattaya
area: Pattaya — boat departures from Bali Hai Pier
desc: Pattaya only British family-run PADI 5-Star IDC. Chandler brothers since 2005. 12m speedboat. Pattaya near islands + Samae San specialty.

name: Regents International School Pattaya (Sports)
desc: International school sports programs: basketball, football, swimming, athletics, rugby, cricket. For school students.

name: Renaissance Pattaya Resort & Spa
desc: 5-star Marriott Bonvoy Renaissance-brand beachfront resort, opened 2017. 257 rooms across 10 floors. 2 outdoor pools + kids pool + Kids Club + full-service spa + fitness centre. Modern desig

name: Royal Varuna Yacht Club
hours: Members + RYA training daily; regattas Jan-Mar peak
desc: Thailand most prestigious yacht club, founded 60+ years ago. RYA-accredited sailing + powerboating training. World-class regattas (ILCA, OK Dinghy, Optimist, Dart, Hobie, Multihull). Pratamn

name: Rusich Club Pattaya (HSIF Thailand)
desc: Russian-language football academy in Pattaya for ages 5-16 (HSIF Thailand). Coaching, weekly training, age-group teams, and Russian-speaking coaches.

name: SailBreeze Sailing School @ Ocean Marina Yacht Club
desc: Thailand most experienced sailing school (20+ years). Based at Ocean Marina Jomtien — Southeast Asia largest marina (450+ berths). IYT certification + yacht charters.

name: Sanctuary of Truth — Wood Temple & Cultural-Sport Park
desc: Pattaya iconic 105m all-teak wood temple, hand-carved without nails since 1981, still under active construction. On-site activities: horseback riding, speed boat tours, traditional Thai wate

name: Sanit Sport Club
desc: Two-zone Mabprachan club: comprehensive fitness centre + dedicated Muay Thai gym. 1,000+ members. Trainer Kru Rung — 40 years Lumpinee/Rajadamnern. Resident MAX Muay Thai champion Krasuk. 4

name: Seafari PADI Dive Centre
area: Behind Mike's Mall — 2 min from Pattaya Beach Road
desc: PADI dive center 2 minutes from Pattaya Beach Road behind Mike's Mall — full course progression from Open Water through Divemaster, plus daily fun-dives to Pattaya islands.

name: SF Strike Bowl Pattaya (Central Festival)
area: Central Festival Pattaya Beach Mall — 6th Floor
desc: Modern mall-attached bowling — 16 regular + 2 VIP lanes (separate partitioned space). Pool tables + sea-view smoking lounge + arcade. SF Group operator. 180 baht/game.

name: Siam Bayshore Resort Pattaya Tennis Courts
area: Walking Street area / South Pattaya Beach Road
desc: Siam Bayshore Resort tennis courts on Walking Street area / South Pattaya Beach Road — 3 outdoor hard courts open to hotel guests and day visitors.

name: Siam Country Club Pattaya
desc: Multiple championship courses: Old Course (1970, Top 100 world), Plantation, Waterside. Asia's premier golf destination.

name: Silk Muay Thai
desc: Premium boutique camp. 4.9/5 rated. All-inclusive packages from ฿25,500/month with private room + pool/sauna/spa + meals.

name: Sitpholek - Institute of Muay Thai Techniques
desc: Pattaya Muay Thai camp mentioned in 2025 best-of lists. Full profile in progress — confirm details with the venue.

name: Sityodtong Pattaya
desc: Founded 1960 by Kru Yodtong. 57+ world champions including Samart Payakaroon. Trained Rob Kaman & Ramon Dekkers. Pilgrimage destination.

name: Sor Klinmee Muay Thai Gym
area: Nong Prue / East Pattaya (Soi Khao Talo area)
desc: Family-run authentic Thai camp, founded 2009 by Mit Klinmee. Home of Sudsakorn Sor Klinmee (278W/330F). Drop-ins ~฿200-300.

name: St. Andrews 2000 Pattaya
area: Ban Chang, Rayong (45 min from Pattaya)
desc: St. Andrews 2000 — championship 18-hole golf course in Ban Chang, Rayong (45 min from Pattaya) with mature parkland setting and full clubhouse facilities.

name: SUN Fitness Pattaya (3 branches)
desc: 3-branch chain across Pattaya — single membership accesses all. Soi Buakhao + Naklua branches.

name: Tara Tennis Club
desc: Newly resurfaced 2022 Pattaya tennis club with 3 hard courts including one covered roof for rain or sun protection. Coaching, hourly hire, social play.

name: Tarzan Adventure Pattaya (Zipline)
area: Na Chom Thian / Sattahip — between Nong Nooch and Golden Cliff Temple
desc: Pattaya jungle zipline park. 25-platform full course + half + kids. Bridges, ladders, abseil, ropes. Near Golden Cliff Temple.

name: Thai Polo & Equestrian Club
area: Banglamung / Mabprachan Lake (25 min north of Pattaya)
desc: Largest multi-functional polo + equestrian in all Asia. 250 hectares. 3 polo fields + 2 practice. 250+ stables. Endurance + Derby. Argentinian vet GM.

name: Thai Sky Adventures (Tandem Skydiving Pattaya)
area: Dropzone 25 km north of Pattaya / Rayong direction
desc: Southeast Asia only full-time skydive drop zone. 25+ years. Tandem from 13,000 ft. 60s freefall at 200 km/h. Free Pattaya pickup.

name: Thai Wake Park Pattaya
desc: Pattaya only cable wakeboarding park. Two lakes (beginner + advanced). All equipment included.

name: Tony's Fitness Gym (Tony's Group Pattaya)
area: Multi-location — Wongamat, Soi Buakhao, Soi Diana Inn, 3rd Road + ~10 Pattaya locations
desc: Legendary old-school bodybuilding gym. Massive free-weights, no-frills, low monthly. A Pattaya institution.

name: TOS Tennis Club / TOS Tennis Academy
area: Baan Suan Lalana — Jomtien Beach (closest to Jomtien)
desc: TOS Tennis Club / TOS Tennis Academy at Baan Suan Lalana — Jomtien Beach side tennis facility (closest to Jomtien) with hard courts, coaching, and social play.

name: Treasure Hill Golf & Country Club
area: Ban Bueng / Khao Khansong (60 km from Pattaya)
desc: Par-72 course, established 1994. Popular for low green fees and enjoyable rounds.

name: True Fitness Pattaya
desc: Popular fitness chain: HIIT, yoga, spinning. Modern facility, group classes, nutrition counseling.

name: Underwater World Pattaya — Aquarium & Shark Dive Experience
desc: Pattaya only aquarium. First modern aquarium in Thailand (2003). 105m+ underwater tunnel. 5,000+ marine animals. 4 zones. Dive-with-sharks program for certified divers. Biggest jellyfish col

name: Universe Gym
desc: Excellent machine assortment, multiple membership packages. North Pattaya commercial gym for varying ability levels.

name: Venum Training Camp Pattaya
area: Soi Khopai / off Thepprasit Road (1.8 km from Jomtien Beach)
desc: Modern multi-discipline facility near Jomtien. Muay Thai, MMA, BJJ, Combat Fitness, S&C, kids program. 2 rings + cage/mat zone.

name: Wave Pattaya Watersports
desc: Multi-sport watersports operator across Pattaya Beach + Jomtien Beach — parasailing, jet ski, banana boat, SUP, kayak, plus arrangement of dive trips and beach activities.

name: WKO Muay Thai & Fitness Pattaya (ISS Gym)
desc: Owner Sifu McInnes was first Westerner to ref Lumpinee (1993). Resident trainer Sakmongkol (231-20-4, 3x Lumpinee, 5x WMC). ~฿4,000/month.

name: Wong Amat Beach — Naklua / Pattaya's Family Swimming Beach
desc: Pattaya quietest, cleanest, most family-friendly main beach. ~1.5km long Naklua coastline with safe-swim zone, beach volleyball court, jet ski + banana boat (central section). Walking distan

name: Yoga Haus Pattaya
desc: Pattaya's most prominent hot yoga studio. Modern fitness-yoga vibe with Hot Yoga and Fit Ball. Walkable central.

name: Yoga Pattaya Studio
desc: Pattaya's first international yoga studio. Ashtanga, Mysore, Hatha, Vinyasa Flow, Stretching, Fitness Yoga. English/Russian/Thai.
